mapper.select: SELECT i.*, p.product_name, w.warehouse_name FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE i.quantity > 0 ORDER BY i.last_update DESC

SELECT i.*, p.product_name, w.warehouse_name FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
i.quantity > 0
AND (p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR w.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY i.last_update DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN warehouses w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
i.quantity > 0
AND (p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR w.warehouse_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT product_id, warehouse_id, SUM(quantity) AS quantity, MAX(last_update) AS last_update FROM inventory WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY product_id, warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, warehouse_id, quantity, last_update) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_update = NOW()
mapper.update: INSERT INTO inventory (product_id, warehouse_id, quantity, last_update) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{quantity}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + #{quantity}, last_update = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM inventory WHERE product_id = #{productId}
